title: Devoluciones extendidas: workflow aprobacion + restock + stats

results.name: SQL R17_RETURNS_EXTENDED.sql idempotente
results.note: db/R17_RETURNS_EXTENDED.sql crea columnas processed_by, original_payment_id, restock_qty, approved_by, approved_at via 'add column if not exists'.

results.name: Check refund_method (cash/card/store_credit/gift_card)
results.note: Constraint pos_returns_refund_method_chk anadido si no existe. Update previo normaliza valores legacy 'efectivo' -> 'cash'.

results.name: Check status (pending/approved/rejected/completed)
results.note: Drop dinamico del check antiguo via pg_constraint, recrea con set ampliado.

results.name: Trigger after_return_approved
results.note: fn_after_return_approved itera items_returned jsonb y suma qty a pos_products.stock cuando status pasa a approved/completed con restock_qty=true.

results.name: Vista v_returns_stats
results.note: Agrega por tenant+dia: total, by_status, refunded_total, top_reason (mode within group).

results.name: POST /api/returns valida sale_id existe
results.note: api/index.js consulta pos_sales?id=eq y retorna 404 si no encuentra.

results.name: POST /api/returns valida items subset
results.note: Itera items_returned, busca product_id en sale.items, valida qty <= original.

results.name: POST /api/returns calcula refund_amount
results.note: Reduce items: price * qty si body no provee refund_amount.

results.name: POST /api/returns force status=pending
results.note: Status inicial siempre pending; processed_by=req.user.id.

results.name: GET /api/returns filtros status/from/to/customer
results.note: Server-side: status, from, to via query string. customer filtrado en cliente.

results.name: POST /api/returns/:id/approve manager+
results.note: Roles permitidos: manager, admin, superadmin. 403 si menor.

results.name: Approve > $500 requiere admin
results.note: Si refund_amount > 500 y rol manager -> 403 'amount > $500 requires admin approval'.

results.name: Approve PATCH approved_by/approved_at
results.note: Update setea approved_by, approved_at=now ISO, status=approved. Trigger SQL hace restock.

results.name: POST /api/returns/:id/reject manager+
results.note: Mismo gate de roles. Acepta body.notes opcional.

results.name: GET /api/returns/stats
results.note: Calcula total, by_status, refunded_total, return_rate (returns/sales), top_reasons (top 5).

results.name: Stats fallback 42P01
results.note: Si tabla pos_returns no existe retorna estructura vacia con note='tabla pendiente', no 500.

results.name: Cliente UI volvix-returns-wiring.js
results.note: VolvixReturns.render(container,saleId): fetch venta, checkbox+qty por item, dropdown REASONS (6) + METHODS (4), POST /api/returns.

results.name: Cliente UI valida seleccion minima
results.note: Si no hay items chequeados muestra 'Selecciona al menos un item' y aborta submit.

results.name: node --check api/index.js
results.note: Syntax OK sin output.

results.name: node --check public/volvix-returns-wiring.js
results.note: Syntax OK sin output.

results.name: Reporte R17_RETURNS_EXTENDED.md
results.note: Documenta SQL, API endpoints, cliente, validacion.
